programme.title: NASCAR O'Reilly Series Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights of the 2026 NASCAR O'Reilly series featuring 4 x O'Reilly Series winner and Kiwi, Shane Van Gisbergen at selected events.

programme.title: NASCAR Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights of the 2026 NASCAR Cup Series as we follow 6 x Cup event winner and Kiwi, Shane van Gisbergen for his third season.

programme.title: MotoGP Highlights
programme.desc: All the action from the 2026 MotoGP World Championship with the biggest names lining up on the best bikes including Kiwi Cormac Buchanan.

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers
programme.desc: The Dirty 7 aren't confident when the Mudders of Mayhem challenge them to a race. Jimmy could lose to a kid half his age and Spiker makes a risky bet.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water
programme.desc: Kayla's two dredge operation is on track to hit paydirt, but Dustin is forced to jeopardize her success for the greater good of Dustin's expanding empire.

programme.title: Threenews
programme.desc: ThreeNews presents comprehensive coverage of global and local news.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A freak hail storm lashes Bondi beach, a flag conceals a drowning tourist and Santa makes an entrance Bondi style. S14 E3.

programme.title: All New Wild Heroes
programme.desc: A tough decision is made for the wellbeing of geriatric Southern white rhinoceros Zambezi, and the Zoo team releases giant wetapunga to the wild.

programme.title: The Floor Australia
programme.desc: 65 contestants are on the floor ready to do or die to move another spot closer to 200k. Tonight a player becomes the first to win a major advantage, but who will it be?

programme.title: Movie: Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes Of G
programme.desc: Gellert Grindelwald plans to raise an army of wizards to rule over non-magical beings. In response, Newt Scamander's former professor, Albus Dumbledore, seeks his help. Stars Eddie Redmayne.

programme.title: Will Trent
programme.desc: Will and Faith's investigation into a small-town murder has large implications when a connection is drawn to a cold case; the death of a security guard perplexes Angie.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral
programme.desc: An armed in Miami, Florida, robber regrets his decision when his victims fight back.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Jane and Charlotte trek through bear country to protect their herd. Three generations of Kilchers build a shack on Perl Island and Otto has a surprise. S9 E6.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: A rift threatens an extended family on their overcrowded Texas homestead. The pressure's on for the Raneys to execute an epic overhaul.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Shaun and Lea happen upon a terrible car accident and discover a young pregnant mother who has been badly injured and needs immediate medical attention.

programme.title: Pretty Little Liars
programme.desc: After her last encounter with Hanna, Aria starts to take note of Zack and wonders if Hanna - while drunk - was telling her the truth. Emily tries to find information linking Alison to Noel.

programme.title: All American
programme.desc: Spencer wants no part of his father's return and Billy confronts him about their past. Meanwhile, Layla forces Asher to reevaluate his life.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina battle investors for a home with midcentury details that could net top dollar.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: As the Italian getaway heats up, Sutton tips Amanda off to gossip. Amanda fires back at Boz, Rachel speaks for herself, and a surprise intervention sends Dorit storming off, stranding Kyle and Erika.

programme.title: The Floor Australia
programme.desc: 65 contestants are on the floor ready to do or die to move another spot closer to 200k. Tonight a player becomes the first to win a major advantage, but who will it be?

programme.title: Beach Hunters
programme.desc: After stressful careers, an Ohio couple wants a laid-back lifestyle in Miramar Beach, Florida. S5 E12.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A Texas couple is embracing adventure in Orange Beach. A water view is a top priority for them, but his fear of heights may keep him on a low floor. S18 E4.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A California couple has entirely different ideas on what the laid-back life means in Los Cabos, Mexico. S172 E12.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A digital nomad looks to set some roots in Madrid. Although she's a seasoned world traveller, she still may be in for a surprise or two.

programme.title: Threenews
programme.desc: ThreeNews presents comprehensive coverage of global and local news.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat Au
programme.desc: With life changing cash on the line, everyday Aussies will have the opportunity to walk away with cash prizes up to $1,000,000.

programme.title: The Floor Australia
programme.desc: Our 56 remaining players duke it out for the $10,000 nightly bonus prize. Tonight it's the battle of the Travel Guides. Who will come out on top?

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a sex-trafficking sting goes wrong, the team races to recover a missing victim, while Maggie teams with a 911 operator to find the girl before she's moved-or worse.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: When two sorority sisters are found stabbed in their off-campus home, the task force heads to Virginia to hunt the suspect, while Hana agrees to meet Ethan after he asks for help.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: As the Italian getaway heats up, Sutton tips Amanda off to gossip. Amanda fires back at Boz, Rachel speaks for herself, and a surprise intervention sends Dorit storming off, stranding Kyle and Erika.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: Buddy gets into the school spirit with a cake for Sofia's school pep rally. Grace takes a special consultation for a 40th birthday cake.

programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Things get explosive when the Kilchers expand a road with the help of a detonation expert. Atz Sr and Bonnie salvage vital resources. S9 E7.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: A young couple struggle to keep their homestead afloat in torrential Texas weather. The Raneys race to save the rain-hit cabin and livestock shelters.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Now that Shaun has called off the wedding, he is forced to confront Lea about their relationship and determine what he really means to her.

programme.title: Pretty Little Liars
programme.desc: Alison's games may have pushed her friends too far when an innocent man's life is put in the balance, so Spencer comes up with a plan B.

programme.title: All American
programme.desc: Spencer finder ud af den virkelige grund til, hvorfor hans far gik sin vej og er knust over sandheden. Billy m‘rker f›lgerne fra sin fortid, og Coop pr›ver at stoppe en plan, hun har lagt.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a home that's full of surprises in California. They work to modernize the house to appeal to the modern-day buyer.

programme.title: Below Deck Down Under
programme.desc: A high-stakes charter gets off to a rocky start when Jenna's cabin mistake puts the interior team under scrutiny. Chef Ben pushes Ellie past her limits and forces Capt. Jason to restore order.

programme.title: The Floor Australia
programme.desc: Our 56 remaining players duke it out for the $10,000 nightly bonus prize. Tonight it's the battle of the Travel Guides. Who will come out on top?
